title: Add Tickflow pi-runner config loader
description: Implement .tick/pi-runner.yaml loading for Tickflow with defaults, verifier definitions, policies, sandbox/worktree options, local runtime resources, and clear validation errors. Config should be optional and backwards-compatible.
acceptance_criteria: Missing config uses defaults; valid config contributes verifiers/policies/runtime settings; invalid YAML or invalid fields produce actionable errors; /tickflow-contract shows config-derived verifiers.
